title: stelis papilio
intro: Stelis papilio, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Stelis papilio include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
